requirement_topic.en: China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964-2024 Evidence Versus Kazakhstan Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964-2024证据与哈萨克斯坦接受要求
requirement_topic.zht: 中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964-2024證據與哈薩克斯坦接受要求

summary.en: Kazakhstan import, market-access, and grid-connection decisions are based on EAEU technical regulations, Kazakhstan standards practice, and project/network approvals. Chinese GB/T reports are best treated as capability evidence to be mapped against Kazakhstan/EAEU requirements, not as automatically recognized conformity documents.
summary.zh: 哈萨克斯坦进口、市场准入和并网决定基于EAEU技术法规、哈萨克斯坦标准实践以及项目/电网批准。中国GB/T报告最好作为能力证据映射至哈萨克斯坦/EAEU要求，而不是视为自动认可的符合性文件。
summary.zht: 哈薩克斯坦進口、市場准入和併網決定基於EAEU技術法規、哈薩克斯坦標準實踐以及項目/電網批准。中國GB/T報告最好作為能力證據映射至哈薩克斯坦/EAEU要求，而不是視為自動認可的符合性文件。

standards_or_laws: EAEU TR CU 004/2011 and TR CU 020/2011 where in scope
Kazakhstan ST RK / GOST / IEC-based project evidence where requested
KEGOC or local network connection technical specifications

summary.en: GB/T 37408-2019 is the common China product technical requirement for PV grid-connected inverters, and GB/T 19964-2024 is the common China technical regulation for PV power stations connected to the power system. Together they are a strong China-side dossier, but they do not create EAC marking rights, Kazakhstan auction eligibility, or KEGOC grid approval.
summary.zh: GB/T 37408-2019是中国光伏并网逆变器常用产品技术要求，GB/T 19964-2024是中国光伏发电站接入电力系统常用技术规定。二者共同构成较强的中国侧资料包，但不会产生EAC标志权利、哈萨克斯坦竞价资格或KEGOC并网批准。
summary.zht: GB/T 37408-2019是中國光伏併網逆變器常用產品技術要求，GB/T 19964-2024是中國光伏發電站接入電力系統常用技術規定。二者共同構成較強的中國側資料包，但不會產生EAC標誌權利、哈薩克斯坦競價資格或KEGOC併網批准。

gap.en: The key gap is recognition and mapping. Exporters should prepare a clause-by-clause bridge from GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964-2024 to TR CU 004/020, IEC 62109, project grid-code settings, and Kazakhstan-language user and installation documentation.
gap.zh: 关键差距是认可和映射。出口商应准备GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964-2024到TR CU 004/020、IEC 62109、项目并网参数以及哈萨克斯坦语言用户和安装文件的逐条桥接表。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距是認可和映射。出口商應準備GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964-2024到TR CU 004/020、IEC 62109、項目併網參數以及哈薩克斯坦語言使用者和安裝文件的逐條橋接表。

mandatory_status.target: Not a Kazakhstan legal route by itself; Kazakhstan/EAEU and project requirements remain mandatory where applicable
mandatory_status.cn: Common China-side technical evidence; mandatory or recommended effect depends on the China project and purchaser context

source.publisher: National Public Service Platform for Standards Information, State Administration for Market Regulation of China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964-2024 are useful starting evidence, but Kazakhstan compliance requires a separate EAEU, standards, grid, and project-approval mapping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964-2024是有用的起点证据，但哈萨克斯坦合规需要单独完成EAEU、标准、并网和项目批准映射。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964-2024是有用的起點證據，但哈薩克斯坦合規需要單獨完成EAEU、標準、併網和項目批准映射。
